Tests device-bound-sessions protocol additions.

Running test: testSessionsAndEvents

--- Checking initial set of sessions is empty ---
Received deviceBoundSessionsAdded event.
No sessions when initialized.

--- Creation event ---
Creation event: {
    creationEventDetails : {
        fetchResult : Success
        newSession : {
            allowedRefreshInitiators : [
                [0] : dbsc.test
            ]
            cookieCravings : [
                [0] : {
                    domain : .dbsc.test
                    httpOnly : true
                    name : dbsc-cookie
                    path : /
                    sameSite : Lax
                    secure : true
                }
            ]
            expiryDate : <number>
            inclusionRules : {
                includeSite : false
                origin : https://dbsc.test:8443
                urlRules : [
                    [0] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/
                        ruleType : Exclude
                    }
                    [1] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/protected-resource.php
                        ruleType : Include
                    }
                    [2] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/refresh.php
                        ruleType : Exclude
                    }
                ]
            }
            key : {
                id : dbsc-session-id
                site : https://dbsc.test
            }
            refreshUrl : https://dbsc.test:8443/inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/refresh.php?cookie_name=dbsc-cookie&domain_prefix=dbsc
        }
    }
    eventId : <string>
    sessionId : dbsc-session-id
    site : https://dbsc.test
    succeeded : true
}

--- Reset tracking device bound session events ---
Device Bound Sessions disabled in DevTools.

--- Checking new set of sessions has one session ---
Re-enabling Device Bound Sessions in DevTools.
New sessions: {
    sessions : [
        [0] : {
            allowedRefreshInitiators : [
                [0] : dbsc.test
            ]
            cookieCravings : [
                [0] : {
                    domain : .dbsc.test
                    httpOnly : true
                    name : dbsc-cookie
                    path : /
                    sameSite : Lax
                    secure : true
                }
            ]
            expiryDate : <number>
            inclusionRules : {
                includeSite : false
                origin : https://dbsc.test:8443
                urlRules : [
                    [0] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/
                        ruleType : Exclude
                    }
                    [1] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/protected-resource.php
                        ruleType : Include
                    }
                    [2] : {
                        hostPattern : dbsc.test
                        pathPrefix : /inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/refresh.php
                        ruleType : Exclude
                    }
                ]
            }
            key : {
                id : dbsc-session-id
                site : https://dbsc.test
            }
            refreshUrl : https://dbsc.test:8443/inspector-protocol/network/resources/dbsc/refresh.php?cookie_name=dbsc-cookie&domain_prefix=dbsc
        }
    ]
}

--- Trigger refresh event ---
Refresh event: {
    eventId : <string>
    refreshEventDetails : {
        fetchResult : Success
        refreshResult : Refreshed
        wasFullyProactiveRefresh : false
    }
    sessionId : dbsc-session-id
    site : https://dbsc.test
    succeeded : true
}

--- Trigger challenge event ---
Challenge event: {
    challengeEventDetails : {
        challenge : new challenge
        challengeResult : Success
    }
    eventId : <string>
    sessionId : dbsc-session-id
    site : https://dbsc.test
    succeeded : true
}

--- Trigger termination event ---
Termination event: {
    eventId : <string>
    sessionId : dbsc-session-id
    site : https://dbsc.test
    succeeded : true
    terminationEventDetails : {
        deletionReason : StoragePartitionCleared
    }
}

Running test: testFetchSchemefulSite
{
    schemefulSite : https://google.com
}
{
    schemefulSite : http://localhost
}
{
    schemefulSite : https://192.168.1.1
}
{
    schemefulSite : file://
}

Running test: testRequestWillBeSentExtraInfo

--- Make sure initial set of sessions is empty ---
Num sessions received: 0

--- Set up four sessions (one for a different site) ---
Sessions added successfully: 4

--- Trigger deferred refresh for session 1, proactive refresh for session 2, nothing for session 3 ---
Usages (only same-site included): [
    [0] : {
        sessionKey : {
            id : dbsc-session-id1
            site : https://dbsc.test
        }
        usage : Deferred
    }
    [1] : {
        sessionKey : {
            id : dbsc-session-id2
            site : https://dbsc.test
        }
        usage : ProactiveRefreshAttempted
    }
    [2] : {
        sessionKey : {
            id : dbsc-session-id3
            site : https://dbsc.test
        }
        usage : InScopeRefreshNotYetNeeded
    }
]

--- Trigger deferred refresh for session 1 for alternate site ---
Usages (only same-site for alternate site included): [
    [0] : {
        sessionKey : {
            id : dbsc-session-id1
            site : https://dbsc-alternate.test
        }
        usage : Deferred
    }
]
